title: What I'm (Un)Grateful For | #shorts
full_text: Okay, Mom. I know you don't want to pay for therapy, so I'm going to be your therapist and we're going to do this exercise. Now, tell me what's on your mind. Uh, my kids are thankless. My life feels hopeless. All day I'm cooking and cleaning and then still they are mad at me because one kid doesn't like it, one kid likes it. It is a pain in the ass basically all of them. So, you feel that you're not appreciated? I feel that I wish I could return them where they came from.
